text: This chapter applies only to new passenger vehicles and to new motortrucks with an unladen weight under 6,000 pounds, except housecars.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3.6. VEHICLE SALES [9950 - 9993]
### Chapter 3. Engine Manufacturers [9980 - 9982]
##### § 9982

This chapter applies only to new passenger vehicles and to new motortrucks with an unladen weight under 6,000 pounds, except housecars.

*(Added by Stats. 1984, Ch. 1264, Sec. 1.)*

subsections.text: This chapter applies only to new passenger vehicles and to new motortrucks with an unladen weight under 6,000 pounds, except housecars.
